issues.comment: Double application of `applyTemplateVariables` (including ad hoc filters). The new code calls `applyTemplateVariables` in `runSplitQuery`, but `DataSourceWithBackend.query()` (called via `datasource.runQuery()` → `super.query()`) already calls `applyTemplateVariables` internally. Since `addAdHocFilters` is NOT idempotent (it calls `addLabelToQuery` for each filter unconditionally), ad hoc filters will be added to the query expression 2 times, producing incorrect queries like `{a="b", job="prometheus", job="prometheus"}`. Tests don't catch this because `datasource.runQuery` is mocked, preventing `super.query()` from being called.

Triple application of `applyTemplateVariables` in the shard split path. `runShardSplitQuery` calls `applyTemplateVariables` (line 57), then calls `splitQueriesByStreamShard` → `runSplitQuery` which calls it again (line 339), then `datasource.runQuery()` → `super.query()` calls it a third time. Since `addAdHocFilters` is not idempotent, ad hoc filters will be added 3 times to the query expression, producing incorrect queries. Tests don't catch this because `datasource.runQuery` is mocked.
